summary: Reconcile conflicting coding patterns and delegation overlap without modifying raw golden examples.
One file and one logical contract have one writer per integration wave; Frontier verifies workspace mode and integrates all artifacts.
MIT recommended, but root license deferred pending golden-example publication and relicensing rights confirmation.
Added canonical FE/BE/SQL conflict annotations, one-writer workspace rules, provider prompt/hook integration, GitHub metadata, decisions, and memory.
Sync, six workflow cases, package validation, official skill/plugin validation, JSON/TOML/links, and 69 golden hashes passed.
Pattern conflict reconciliation and delegation overlap policy completed; license rights and owner pattern tour remain explicit follow-ups.
